indicators.name: empty floor
indicators.rationale: No horizontal rest surface available for sleep.

indicators.name: no furniture
indicators.rationale: No bed, chair, or other furniture to provide a resting surface.

indicators.name: no windows
indicators.rationale: No natural light source for circadian regulation.

indicators.name: no ceiling fans or air conditioning
indicators.rationale: No means to control temperature or humidity.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for sleep (primary). There is no horizontal rest surface, no furniture, no windows, no curtains, and no means to control temperature or humidity. The lack of any sleep-supportive features makes this a poor candidate for a sleep environment.
